snapshot.content: Cycle 274 (execution): Researched 12 newsletter, blog, and directory venues for project submissions — complementing the 12 GitHub awesome-lists found in cycle 272. Top actionable venues: TAAFT (1.2M newsletter subs, $20 for open-source, 9M monthly page views), AI Agent Store (free guest post + agent directory), and 9 free AI tool directories for batch submission. All documented in artifacts/research/newsletter-blog-venues.md.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Submit PR to e2b-dev/awesome-ai-agents (task sort_order 40). Fork their repo, add the Living Board entry from pitch-materials.md Variant 1 into the Open source > General purpose section, and open a PR.
